description_long: This object is a sturdy, metal guard rail commonly found in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or parking lots. It features a horizontal top rail supported by evenly spaced vertical bars, all constructed from cylindrical tubing. The guard rail is finished in a uniform yellow-brown color, giving it high visibility and a utilitarian appearance. The base consists of two flat, rectangular plates that provide stability and allow for secure mounting to the ground. The ends of the rail are blunt and squared off, with no additional end treatments or safety features. The overall design is simple, robust, and intended to serve as a physical barrier to guide or restrict pedestrian or vehicular movement.
description: A yellow-brown metal guard rail with vertical bars and flat base plates, designed for use as a sturdy urban barrier.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the guard rail, with all vertical bars and both base plates visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the rail and the thickness of the top bar and base plate.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the vertical bars and base plates from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the depth of the rail and base plate.
